# UX Checklist: Show Top Contributing Factors

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for explanation display.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/015-top-contributing-factors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are user-visible outcomes specified for success, partial explanations, qualitative-only explanations, and explanation unavailable? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for top-N ranking, separation of increases/decreases, and factor labeling? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for map highlighting and non-visualizable factors? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are contribution magnitudes clearly labeled with consistent formats and units? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are warning messages specified for missing categories, qualitative limitations, and explanation unavailability? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do functional requirements and acceptance scenarios align on factor ordering and tie-breaking? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK007 Are accessibility requirements defined for explanation panel, factor items, and map interactions? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
